commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh He becomes poor who has a slack hand: but the hand of the diligent makes rich. Even of those who had plenty. This is true in a spiritual sense likewise. (Calmet) The kingdom of heaven suffereth violence. (Haydock) Otiositas mater nugarum, noverca virtutum. Bernard, consid. ) He This is not in Hebrew, Greek, St. Jerome, or in several Latin copies. (Calmet) We find it in the Septuagint, chap. He derives no benefits from lies. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
